data.title: Restyle Story as a cream non-house section + tokenize (single gold accent)

data.body: DESIGN DECISION (human): Story is NOT a house, so it should read distinctly — cream background, charcoal text, editorial calm — vs the color-flooded house pages. Collapse Story's 3 golds (#DFCA7A page bg, #8A7A20 deep accent, #D4BA58 nav/TalkCard) to ONE identity accent #D4BA58 (the only one legible on cream — that contrast problem is WHY the 3rd color existed). Background → cream, text stays charcoal. Tokenize as SECTIONS.story + --color-section-story, extend sync test. This is a LIVE visual redesign — orchestrator will show the result before merging; if the #D4BA58 FractalPattern reads too faint on cream, fall back to #8A7A20 for the pattern only.
